bedrock_preparation_exception_scope: Usability test protocol candidate-only como preparo documental para Product Reality Lab. Nao recruta usuario real, nao executa sessao real, nao coleta audio/video/tela/telemetria real, nao usa PII, nao usa customer data, nao autoriza browser real, billing real, OAuth real, integracao real, secrets, producao, Project_ARIS mutation ou real_apply.
